response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, deep-learning workload analysis, and hardware-software co-design, which are core to the role. While Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills (web, mobile, embedded) and some exposure to performance optimization, his background does not align with the required hardware-centric or AI-focused expertise. Additionally, the resume does not indicate any work with SIMD/MIMD architectures, GPU workloads, or system-on-chip designs.
strengths: Proven software development expertise across multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Node.js, Go, D, etc.)
Experience with performance optimization in low-latency systems and real-time applications
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking in diverse domains (GIS, AI agents, embedded systems)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or deep-learning optimization
Lacks required qualifications (education/experience mix) for Principal-level hardware-focused roles
No visible background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or hardware-software co-design
